name: Strawberry Charlotte Russe
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut jelly roll into 1/2-inch slices.
2. Arrange slices over bottom and around sides of oiled 2 1/2-quart mixing bowl.
3. Dissolve gelatine in hot water.
4. Add marshmallows and partially frosted strawberries, stirring until marshmallows dissolve.
5. Add lemon juice and chill until partially congealed.
6. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
7. Gradually beat sugar into the egg whites.
8. Fold the mixture of egg whites and sugar into the gelatin mixture.
9. Blend in whipped cream and nuts.
10. Pile mixture lightly into jelly roll-lined mold.
11. Chill until firm.
12. Unmold and serve. Makes 1 to 12 servings.
